test.name: Verify person-evidence link for death certificate
test.description: Review the person-evidence link pe_005 (death cert assertion a_013 → Patrick I1). The link should be 'confident' given the death certificate directly names the deceased.

input.user_message: Review the identity link between the death certificate and Patrick Flynn.

additional_criteria: Should confirm that pe_005 linking a_013 to I1 is appropriate at 'confident' level — the death certificate is for Patrick Flynn of Schuylkill County, matching all known attributes
